sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Las Vegas</city> <country>United States</country> <description>consectetuer adipiscing elit proin risus praesent lectus vestibulum quam sapien</description> <end_date>1986-06-10</end_date> <make>Chevrolet</make> <model>Camaro</model> <pin>7784</pin> <start_date>1980-02-13</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 04:55:22</sys_created_on> <sys_id>cdd48ba2fd4b32107f44b9211467feb0</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 04:55:22</sys_updated_on> <vin>5GAKVCKD4EJ844475</vin> <year>1980</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
